title: koeleria spicata subsp. mollis
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. mollis, also known as a subspecies of the Koeleria spicata or June grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Koeleria spicata subsp. mollis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Koeleria spicata subsp. mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
